results.title: GitHub - mvanhorn/last30days-skill: AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary · GitHub
results.description: clawhub install last30days-official · git clone https://github.com/mvanhorn/last30days-skill.git ln -s "$(pwd)/last30days-skill/skills/last30days" ~/.claude/skills/last30days · The symlink keeps the install in sync with your working tree as you edit — no re-copy needed. For claude.ai, build the .skill file from source: bash skills/last30days/scripts/build-skill.sh produces dist/last30days.skill. Reddit (with comments), Hacker News, Polymarket, and GitHub work immediately.

results.title: Agent Skills Marketplace | Claude, Codex & ChatGPT Skills · LobeHub
results.description: Credits: Original skill by @blader - https://github.com/blader/humanizer ... Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via a background process. Use when: (1) building or creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in a temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that requires file exploration.
